name: BGE-Base Fine-tuned (Pipe Format)
description: Evaluation of BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5 fine-tuned on domain triplets with pipe serialization. Architecture comparison vs nomic-embed-v1.5 (both ~109-137M params, 768-dim). Tests whether ModernBERT architecture provides meaningful advantage.
notes: Architecture comparison to exp 003. Does ModernBERT (nomic) vs classic BERT (bge-base) matter for entity resolution after fine-tuning? MIT license is a plus.
